subject: [PATCH v1 2/9] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying to ring

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch refactors the io-uring header copying logic in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) driver by moving it into a new function called copy_header_to_ring(). This makes the code more clear and centralized, allowing for better error handling and rate-limited logging. The function takes three arguments: the user-space ring buffer address, the header to be copied, and its size. It uses the copy_to_user() function to perform the actual copying and returns an error if it fails. The patch modifies several functions in the dev_uring.c file to use this new function instead of duplicating the copying logic.
